curation.synopsis: Arcadian Leontus, Lord Commander of the Segmentum Solar, has never known defeat — but on the arid world of Fortuna Minor, a Speed Waaagh! strips him of his armies and leaves him stranded with a handful of survivors and freed prisoners. Cut off from reinforcement, outgunned, and hunted by a dangerously cunning ork warlord, the Lord Commander must forge a coherent fighting force from desperate soldiers and prove that tactical genius alone can wrest a world back from the green tide. As the noose tightens and the Waaagh! gathers speed, Leontus learns that the line between a commander's confidence and his hubris can be measured in the blood of the men who follow him. A portrait of command under impossible odds.
